home.hero_subtitle: Your personal finance assistant. Use Google Sheets for cloud sync, or work fully offline with a local Excel file. No server, no database.
home.hero_note: No server. No database. Your data stays yours — always.
home.offline_tooltip: Use the app without Google sign-in — upload an Excel file
home.mode_google_desc: Sign in with Google and connect a spreadsheet. Data syncs across devices. AI insights powered by Gemini.
home.mode_offline_desc: No login required. Upload an Excel or CSV file. All edits persist in IndexedDB — export anytime.
home.preview_ai_tip: 💡 You spent 32% more on dining this month. Consider setting a budget limit.
home.features_title: Everything you need to manage your finances
home.features_subtitle: A complete expense tracker that respects your privacy — your data never leaves your own Google account.
home.feature_dashboard_desc: Monthly totals, top categories, budget progress, and spending charts — all at a glance.
home.feature_expenses_desc: Add, edit, and delete expenses with categories, amounts, dates, and descriptions.
home.feature_ocr_desc: Snap a receipt — Gemini Vision extracts the merchant, amount, and date automatically.
home.feature_insights_desc: Gemini 2.5 Flash analyses your patterns and gives actionable recommendations in your language.
home.feature_categories_desc: Create categories with Material 3 icons, colors, and monthly budget limits.
home.feature_sheets_desc: Your data lives in your own Google Spreadsheet — no proprietary database, no vendor lock-in.
home.feature_i18n_desc: English, French, and Arabic (RTL) — switchable at runtime with no page reload.
home.feature_pwa_desc: Installable PWA — add it to your home screen on iOS and Android. Works offline too.
home.offline_subtitle: Upload your Excel file and track expenses without any internet connection. All data is saved to IndexedDB in your browser — it persists across sessions.
home.offline_feature_offline_mode_desc: No Google account needed. Works anywhere, even without internet.
home.offline_feature_file_upload_desc: Upload .xlsx or .csv with Expenses, Categories, and Settings tabs.
home.offline_feature_export_desc: Download your current data as an .xlsx file at any time.
home.offline_feature_migrate_desc: Upload your exported file to Google Sheets anytime to switch modes.
home.step1_desc: One click — no account creation, no password, no email verification.
home.step2_desc: Paste your Google Sheet ID. The app creates all required tabs automatically.
home.step3_desc: Add expenses manually or scan a receipt. AI insights are one tap away.
home.offline_step1_desc: Get the blank .xlsx template with all columns and default categories pre-filled.
home.offline_step2_desc: Open Settings → Local File and upload your filled .xlsx or .csv file.
home.offline_step3_desc: Add expenses, edit categories. Data persists in IndexedDB. Export any time.
home.cta_banner_subtitle: Free, open source, and your data stays yours — online or offline.

login.app_subtitle: Track your spending, powered by Google Sheets
login.login_description: Connect your Google account to start tracking expenses. Your data is stored securely in your own Google Sheet.

nav.offline_message: You're offline — data will sync when reconnected.
nav.install_app_message: Install Expense Tracker AI for quick access.

dashboard.connect_spreadsheet_notice: Connect a spreadsheet in Settings to see your dashboard.

expenses.connect_spreadsheet_notice: Connect a spreadsheet in Settings to start tracking expenses.
expenses.no_expenses_get_started: No expenses yet — click Add Expense to get started.

expense_form.scan_receipt_tooltip: Scan a receipt to auto-fill the form

categories.connect_spreadsheet_notice: Connect a spreadsheet in Settings first.
categories.expenses_lose_category: Expenses using this category will lose their category label.

insights.page_subtitle: Powered by Gemini — analysing your spending patterns
insights.connect_spreadsheet_notice: Connect a spreadsheet in Settings first.
insights.add_expenses_first: Add some expenses first so Gemini has data to analyse.
insights.click_generate_insights: Click Generate Insights to get personalised recommendations based on your

settings.local_file_subtitle: Use an Excel or CSV file — no login, no internet required
settings.local_file_hint: Upload an .xlsx or .csv file with Expenses, Categories and Settings tabs. All edits are kept in memory until you export.
settings.local_file_error: Failed to read the file — please check the format
settings.switched_to_google: Switched back to Google Sheets mode
settings.push_panel_title: Sync offline data to Google Sheets
settings.push_panel_desc: Push all your offline expenses and categories to a connected Google Spreadsheet. This will overwrite the sheet's current data.
settings.push_step_sign_in: Sign in with Google first (use the Account card below)
settings.push_step_connect_sheet: Connect a spreadsheet first (use the Google Sheet card below)
settings.push_success: Synced {exps} expenses and {cats} categories to Google Sheets
settings.push_failed: Failed to sync to Google Sheets
settings.google_sheet_subtitle: Connect a Google Spreadsheet to store your expenses
settings.step_1: Go to sheets.google.com and create a new blank spreadsheet
settings.step_2: Copy the Spreadsheet ID from the URL bar
settings.step_3: Paste it above and click Connect & Set Up
settings.step_4: The app will automatically create the Expenses, Categories, and Settings tabs
settings.sync_migrated: Migrated {cats} categories and updated {exps} expenses — data reloaded
settings.ai_subtitle: Your personal Gemini API key — stored only in your spreadsheet
settings.ai_key_hint: Used for AI Insights and receipt scanning. Never sent to our servers.
settings.ai_key_get: Get a free key at Google AI Studio
settings.ai_key_saved: API key saved to your spreadsheet

auth_callback.no_auth_code: No authorization code received from Google.
